introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. It is located in the Midway America section of the park and features sharp turns, steep drops, and small cars.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: White track and blue supports. The ride is a standard wild mouse model from Mack Rides.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On October 11, 2025, a car stalled on one of the turns after a sweatshirt dropped from the car became lodged beneath a wheel. Riders were evacuated from the location, the object was removed, and the car was able to return to the station.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA. It is located in the Midway America section of the park and features sharp turns, steep drops, and small cars.

Wild Mouse opened on May 8, 1999.

White track and blue supports. The ride is a standard wild mouse model from Mack Rides.



On October 11, 2025, a car stalled on one of the turns after a sweatshirt dropped from the car became lodged beneath a wheel. Riders were evacuated from the location, the object was removed, and the car was able to return to the station.
